findings.title: S3 bucket publicly accessible
findings.description: S3 bucket has public access enabled allowing anonymous reads
findings.recommendation: Enable S3 Block Public Access at the bucket level

findings.title: EC2 instance with overly permissive security group
findings.description: Security group allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22 (SSH)
findings.recommendation: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges or use SSM Session Manager

findings.title: IAM role with wildcard permissions
findings.description: IAM role has Action: '*' and Resource: '*' policy attached
findings.recommendation: Apply principle of least privilege to IAM policies
